deviceUuidHint: Leave default unless you want to mimic your own device id
legacyPollIntervalSecHint: Only used for legacy/Aliyun telemetry. Range: 10-300 seconds.
legacyTelemetryTransportHint: MQTT push is experimental; polling is currently recommended.
storeDebugPayloadsHint: Stores lastPayload and lastProtoContent. Enable only for analysis.
aliyunMqttUseTls: 为 legacy/Aliyun MQTT 启用 TLS（端口 8883）
aliyunMqttUseTlsHint: 当您的网络阻止出站 1883 端口时启用。默认关闭以保持向后兼容。
aliyunMqttTlsAllowInsecure: 跳过 TLS 证书验证（legacy/Aliyun MQTT）
aliyunMqttTlsAllowInsecureHint: 仅在启用 TLS 时有效。禁用代理服务器证书验证（rejectUnauthorized=false）。仅当您的 Node.js 无法验证 Aliyun 证书链时启用（典型错误：'unable to get local issuer certificate'）。连接仍然加密但不再经过身份验证。
